select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE BRD_ID = 1 AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isNotEqual: SELECT A.BRD_ID brd_id , A.BRD_NM brd_nm , A.BRD_NM2 brd_nm2 , A.BRD_LEVEL brd_level , A.BRD_STEP brd_step , A.BRD_POSTTERM brd_postterm , A.BRD_UPPER brd_upper , A.BRD_GB brd_gb , A.BRD_URL brd_url , A.BRD_EXPLAIN brd_explain , A.BRD_ACCESS brd_access , A.ATTACH_SIZE attach_size , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_clscnt , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) sub_rescnt , '0' Access_Lvl , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A WHERE Brd_Upper = IFNULL(#v_P_ParentID#,0) AND Brd_Company = #v_P_CompanyID# AND Brd_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY Brd_Step

select.isEmpty: SELECT A.BRD_ID BRD_ID , A.BRD_NM BRD_NM , A.BRD_NM2 BRD_NM2 , A.BRD_LEVEL BRD_LEVEL , A.BRD_STEP BRD_STEP , A.BRD_POSTTERM BRD_POSTTERM , A.BRD_UPPER BRD_UPPER , A.BRD_GB BRD_GB , A.BRD_URL BRD_URL , A.BRD_EXPLAIN BRD_EXPLAIN , A.BRD_ACCESS BRD_ACCESS , A.ATTACH_SIZE ATTACH_SIZE , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_CLSCNT , ( SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID) , 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) SUB_RESCNT , '0' ACCESS_LVL , A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_ID = 1 AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND ( MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEmpty:
SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID) , A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_CLSCNT, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(BRD_ID), 0) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = A.BRD_ID AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '1' AND (MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT(BRD_ID) , A.BRD_NM AS BRD_NM, A.BRD_NM2 AS BRD_NM2, A.BRD_LEVEL AS BRD_LEVEL, A.BRD_STEP AS BRD_STEP, A.BRD_POSTTERM AS BRD_POSTTERM, A.BRD_UPPER AS BRD_UPPER, A.BRD_GB AS BRD_GB, A.BRD_URL AS BRD_URL, A.BRD_EXPLAIN AS BRD_EXPLAIN, A.BRD_ACCESS AS BRD_ACCESS, A.ATTACH_SIZE AS ATTACH_SIZE, 0 AS SUB_CLSCNT, 0 AS SUB_RESCNT, '' AS ACCESS_LVL, A.APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD A LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_RESACL B ON A.BRD_ID = B.RESID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.BRD_UPPER = #v_P_PARENTID# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_COMPANYID# AND A.BRD_GB = '2' AND (MEMBER_ID = #v_PCOMID# OR MEMBER_ID= #v_PDEPTID# OR MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' OR MEMBER_ID IS NULL) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

sqlMap.select: SELECT BRD_ID , CASE #v_LANG# WHEN'1' THEN BRD_NM ELSE BRD_NM2 END BRD_NM, RES_MAX_USER_CNT, APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_BRD_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_COMPANY# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND APPROVEFLAG <> '2' ORDER BY BRD_GB, BRD_STEP

SELECT NUM , PNUM , OWNERID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , RETURNFLAG, IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2) OWNERNM , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DESCRIPTION, U.DESCRIPTION2) DEPTNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.WRITERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '0'
AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TITLE, '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '&', '&') LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_TITLE#, '%')
AND ( OWNERNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( DEPTNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.NUM ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND ApproveFlag = '1' AND num <> #v_P_NUM# AND REFLAG = '0' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.OWNERID , SCH.TITLE TITLE, LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.APPROVEFLAG , SCH.RETURNFLAG, IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2) OWNERNM , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DESCRIPTION, U.DESCRIPTION2) DEPTNM , SCH.COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID AND SCH.COMPANYID = BRD.BRD_COMPANY LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON SCH.WRITERID = U.CN AND SCH.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATE AND COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND REFLAG = '0' AND BRD.BRD_UPPER = #v_pOwnerID# AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BRD.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT A.num , PNUM , A.ownerID , A.title title , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , A.companyID , CHARACTERID , APPROVEFLAG , RETURNFLAG , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2) OWNERNM , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DESCRIPTION, U.DESCRIPTION2) DEPTNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition C ON A.ownerID = C.ownerID AND A.num = C.num AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.WRITERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND ( STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME )
AND REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TITLE, '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '&', '&') LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_TITLE#, '%')
AND ( OWNERNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERNAME#, '%') ) AND ( DEPTNM LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_WRITERDEPT#, '%') ) AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY A.NUM ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT NUM , PNUM , SCH.ownerID , SCH.TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , ALERTTIME , REFLAG , GRESFLAG , WRITERID , IMPORTANCE , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY , ATTACHFLAG , CHARACTERID , SCH.ApproveFlag , SCH.returnFlag , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2) OWNERNM , IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DESCRIPTION, U.DESCRIPTION2) DEPTNM , SCH.companyID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SCH JOIN TBL_RS_BRD BRD ON SCH.OWNERID = BRD.BRD_ID AND SCH.TENANT_ID = BRD.TENANT_ID AND SCH.COMPANYID = BRD.BRD_COMPANY LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON SCH.WRITERID = U.CN AND SCH.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD.Brd_Upper = #v_POWNERID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND SCH.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BRD.APPROVEFLAG <> '2' ORDER BY STARTDATE ASC, ENDDATE DESC

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_COUNT, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_GB, BRD_GROUP, BRD_ID, BRD_LEVEL, CASE #v_lang# WHEN '2' THEN BRD_NM2 ELSE BRD_NM END AS BRD_NM, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_REF, BRD_STEP, BRD_UPPER, BRD_URL, CONCAT(SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 7, 2)) MAKEDATE, OWNDEPTID, CASE #v_lang# WHEN '2' THEN OWNDEPTNM2 ELSE OWNDEPTNM END AS OWNDEPTNM, OWNERCALL, OWNERID, CASE #v_lang# WHEN '2' THEN OWNERNM2 ELSE OWNERNM END AS OWNERNM, CASE #v_lang# WHEN '2' THEN OWNERPOSITION2 ELSE OWNERPOSITION END AS OWNERPOSITION, REPLY_MAIL_FG, RESLOCATION, APPROVEFLAG, RES_MAX_DATE, RES_MAX_USER_CNT FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY BRD_STEP LIMIT #v_PTOPCNT#
SELECT COUNT(BRD_ID) cnt FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_UPPER = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_ID , BRD_NM , BRD_NM2 , BRD_EXPLAIN , OWNDEPTID , OWNDEPTNM , OWNDEPTNM2 , OWNERID , OWNERNM , OWNERNM2 , OWNERPOSITION , OWNERPOSITION2 , OWNERCALL , IFNULL(RESLOCATION, ' ') RESLOCATION , CONCAT(SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 7, 2)) MAKEDATE , IFNULL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG , IFNULL(RETURNFLAG, '0') RETURNFLAG , IFNULL(REPEATFLAG, '1') REPEATFLAG , BRD_ACCESS , RES_MAX_DATE , RES_MAX_USER_CNT FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_pBrdID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_pCompanyID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET BRD_STEP = BRD_STEP - 1 WHERE BRD_UPPER = ( SELECT S1.BRD_UPPER FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S1 ) AND BRD_STEP > ( SELECT S2.BRD_STEP FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AS S2 ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_BRD SET OWNDEPTID = #v_P_ODeptID#, OWNDEPTNM = #v_P_ODeptNm#, OWNERID = #v_P_OwnerID#, OWNERNM = #v_P_OwnerNm#, OWNERPOSITION = #v_P_OwnerPos#, OWNERCALL = #v_P_OwnerCall#, BRD_NM = #v_P_Brd_NM#, RESLOCATION = #v_P_ResLocation#, BRD_EXPLAIN = #v_P_Brd_Explain#, APPROVEFLAG = #v_P_Approve#, RETURNFLAG = #v_P_Return#, REPEATFLAG = #v_P_Repeat#, BRD_NM2 = #v_P_Brd_NM2#, OWNDEPTNM2 = #v_P_ODeptNm2#, OWNERNM2 = #v_P_OwnerNm2#, OWNERPOSITION2 = #v_P_OwnerPos2#, RES_MAX_DATE = #v_P_ResMaxDate#, RES_MAX_USER_CNT = #v_P_ResMaxUserCnt# WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(BRD_ID) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (BRD_LEVEL + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ClassGB# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(Brd_Step) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_BRD ( BRD_UPPER, OWNDEPTID, OWNDEPTNM, OWNERID, OWNERNM, OWNERPOSITION, OWNERCALL, BRD_NM, RESLOCATION, BRD_EXPLAIN, BRD_COMPANY, BRD_ID, BRD_GB, BRD_LEVEL, BRD_STEP, MAKEDATE, ATTACH_SIZE, BRD_GROUP, BRD_URL, BRD_ACCESS, BRD_POSTTERM, BRD_COUNT, BRD_REF, APPROVEFLAG, BRD_NM2, OWNDEPTNM2, OWNERNM2, OWNERPOSITION2, RETURNFLAG, REPEATFLAG, TENANT_ID, RES_MAX_DATE, RES_MAX_USER_CNT ) VALUES ( #v_P_ClassGB#, #v_P_ODeptID#, #v_P_ODeptNm#, #v_P_OwnerID#, #v_P_OwnerNm#, #v_P_OwnerPos#, #v_P_OwnerCall#, #v_P_Brd_NM#, #v_P_ResLocation#, #v_P_Brd_Explain#, #v_P_CompanyID#, #v_Brd_ID#, #v_Brd_GB#, #v_Brd_Level#, #v_Brd_Step#, DATE_FORMAT(UTC_TIMESTAMP(),'%Y%m%d'), 20, 'A00', '', #v_Brd_Access#, 365, 0, 0, #v_P_Approve#, #v_P_Brd_NM2#, #v_P_ODeptNm2#, #v_P_OwnerNm2#, #v_P_OwnerPos2#, #v_P_Return#, #v_P_Repeat#, #tenantID#, #v_P_ResMaxDate#, #v_P_ResMaxUserCnt# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET APPROVEFLAG = #v_PAPPROVE# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET RETURNFLAG = #v_PRETURN# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND OWNERID = #v_POWNERID# AND NUM = #v_PNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION SET STARTDATETIME = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATETIME = STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), REWAY = #v_pReWay#, REDAY = #v_pReDay#, RENUM = #v_pReNum#, REYOIL = #v_pReYoil#, REMONTH = #v_pReMonth#, REORD = #v_pReOrd#, ENDFLAG = #v_pEndFlag#, RECOUNT = #v_pReCount# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.OWNERID, A.NUM, A.PNUM, A.COMPANYID, A.WRITERID, IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', IFNULL(D.DISPLAYNAME, U.DESCRIPTION) , IFNULL(D.DISPLAYNAME2, U.DESCRIPTION2)) DEPTNM, IF(#v_lang# LIKE '1', U.DISPLAYNAME, U.DISPLAYNAME2) OWNERNM, A.TITLE, A.LOCATION, A.TIMEDISPLAY, DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(B.STARTDATETIME, A.STARTDATE), '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(B.ENDDATETIME, A.ENDDATE), '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, A.ALLDAY, A.ALERTTIME, A.CONTENT, A.IMPORTANCE, A.REFLAG, A.GRESFLAG, DATE_FORMAT(A.WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY, A.ENTRYLIST, A.CHARACTERID, A.ATTACHFLAG, A.PUBLICFLAG, A.APPROVEFLAG, A.RETURNFLAG, A.SCHEDULEID, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = A.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION B ON A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID AND A.NUM = B.NUM AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON A.WRITERID = U.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND A.OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND A.NUM = #v_pNum# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION (NUM, OWNERID, STARTDATETIME, ENDDATETIME, REWAY, REDAY, RENUM, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) VALUES ( #v_pNum#, #v_pOwnerID#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_pStartDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_pEndDateTime#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), #v_pReWay#, #v_pReDay#, #v_pReNum#, #v_pReYoil#, #v_pReMonth#, #v_pReOrd#, #v_pEndFlag#, #v_pReCount#, #v_pCompanyID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE, REFLAG, GRESFLAG, DATE_FORMAT(WRITEDAY, '%Y-%m-%d %T') WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, PUBLICFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, RETURNFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND PNUM = #v_pNum# AND OWNERID = #v_pEntryID# AND WRITERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_ATTACH WHERE RESID = #resID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT RESID , BRDNM , FORMTEXT FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_pRESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT OWNERID FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT BRD_UPPER FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND RESID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPT_YN FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND RESID = #v_PBRDID# AND MEMBER_ID = #v_PUSERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(REPEATFLAG, '1') REPEATFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_PBRDID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND BRD_GB = '2' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DEPARTMENT FROM( SELECT D.department FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# and d.cn = #writerID# UNION ALL SELECT C.cn as department FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# and C.displayname = #deptNm# AND B.CN = #writerID# ) E LIMIT 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM ( RESID, BRDNM, FORMTEXT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_RESID#, #v_BRDNM#, #v_FORMTEXT#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM SET BRDNM = #v_BRDNM#, FORMTEXT = #v_FORMTEXT# WHERE RESID = #v_RESID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEFORM WHERE RESID = #v_DELCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET REFLAG = '4' WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, deptNM, ownerNM, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, companyID, characterID, attachFlag, tenant_ID ) SELECT #v_MaxNum# num , #v_P_pnum# pnum , OWNERID , WRITERID , DEPTNM , OWNERNM , TITLE , LOCATION , TIMEDISPLAY , STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_sDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') startDate , STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_eDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') endDate , ALERTTIME , CONTENT , IMPORTANCE , '4' reFlag , GRESFLAG , ENTRYLIST , ALLDAY , STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') writeDay , #v_P_companyID# companyID , CHARACTERID , ATTACHFLAG , tenant_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_pnum# AND REFLAG = '1' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNERNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT DEPTNM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT D.CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME , D.title, D.DESCRIPTION , D.DESCRIPTION2, D.department FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# UNION ALL SELECT B.cn, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME , A.title, C.DISPLAYNAME AS DESCRIPTION, C.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DESCRIPTION2, A.deptid FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID RIGHT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# ) BB
#ownerList[]#
GROUP BY(BB.CN)
#ownerList[]#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) OR ( COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID, ownerNM, deptNM, ApproveFlag, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_P_num#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, #v_P_reFlag#, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #v_tmpOwnerNm#, #v_tmpDeptNm#, #v_P_Approve#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_P_title#, LOCATION = #v_P_location#, TIMEDISPLAY = #v_P_timeDisplay#, STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ALERTTIME = #v_P_alertTime#, CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = #v_P_importance#, REFLAG = #v_P_reFlag#, GRESFLAG = #v_P_gresFlag#, ALLDAY = #v_P_allDay#, WRITEDAY = #nowDate#, ENTRYLIST = #v_P_entryList#, ATTACHFLAG = #v_P_attachFlag#, CHARACTERID = #v_P_characterID# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_writerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( num, pnum, ownerID, writerID, title, location, timeDisplay, startDate, endDate, alertTime, CONTENT, importance, reFlag, gresFlag, entryList, allDay, writeDay, attachFlag, companyID, characterID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxNum#, #v_P_pnum#, #v_P_ownerID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_title#, #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, #v_P_startDate#, #v_P_endDate#, #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, 3, #v_P_gresFlag#, #v_P_entryList#, #v_P_allDay#, #nowDate#, #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_characterID#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND PNUM = #v_P_num# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #v_P_title#, LOCATION = #v_P_location#, TIMEDISPLAY = #v_P_timeDisplay#, STARTDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENDDATE = STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ALERTTIME = #v_P_alertTime#, CONTENT = #v_P_content#, IMPORTANCE = #v_P_importance#, REFLAG = #v_P_reFlag#, GRESFLAG = #v_P_gresFlag#, ALLDAY = #v_P_allDay#, WRITEDAY = STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), ENTRYLIST = #v_P_entryList#, ATTACHFLAG = #v_P_attachFlag#, CHARACTERID = #v_P_characterID#, APPROVEFLAG = #v_P_Approve# WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND NUM = #v_P_num# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT APPROVEFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_companyID#
SELECT RETURNFLAG FROM TBL_RS_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND BRD_COMPANY = #v_P_companyID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT (IFNULL(MAX(num) , 0) + 1) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ( OWNERID, NUM, PNUM, COMPANYID, WRITERID, DEPTNM, OWNERNM, TITLE, LOCATION, TIMEDISPLAY, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, ALLDAY, ALERTTIME, CONTENT, IMPORTANCE , REFLAG, GRESFLAG, WRITEDAY, ENTRYLIST, CHARACTERID, ATTACHFLAG, APPROVEFLAG, RETURNFLAG, SCHEDULEID, TENANT_ID , DEPTID) VALUES ( #v_P_ownerID#, #v_Num#, #v_P_pnum#, #v_P_companyID#, #v_P_writerID#, #v_P_deptNM#, #v_P_ownerNM#, #v_P_title# , #v_P_location#, #v_P_timeDisplay#, STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_startDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T'), STR_TO_DATE(#v_P_endDate#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_P_allDay#, #v_P_alertTime#, #v_P_content#, #v_P_importance#, IFNULL(#v_P_reFlag#,' '), IFNULL(#v_P_gresFlag#,' '), STR_TO_DATE(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') , #v_P_entryList#, IFNULL(#v_P_characterID#,0), #v_P_attachFlag#, #v_P_Approve#, #v_P_ReturnFlag#, #v_P_ScheduleID#, #tenantID#, #deptId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(num), 0) FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT OWNERID, NUM, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATETIME, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATETIME, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATETIME, REWAY, RENUM, REDAY, REYOIL, REMONTH, REORD, ENDFLAG, RECOUNT, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND OWNERID = #v_pOwnerID# AND NUM = #v_pNum# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT C.ownerID as ownerID , C.num as num , C.companyID , DATE_FORMAT(C.startDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %T') startDateTime , DATE_FORMAT(C.endDateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %T') endDateTime , C.reWay as reWay, C.reNum as reNum, C.reDay as reDay, C.reYoil , C.reMonth as reMonth, C.reOrd as reOrd, C.endFlag as endFlag, C.reCount as reCount, B.allDay as allDay FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE B JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION C ON B.ownerID = C.ownerID AND B.num = C.num AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.companyID = #v_p_companyID# AND B.ownerID = #v_p_ownerID# AND B.ApproveFlag = '1' AND B.num <> #v_p_num# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT member_id, min(access_lvl) as access_lvl FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE companyid = #companyID# AND resid = #resID# AND ( MEMBER_ID = #memberID# OR MEMBER_ID = 'everyone' ) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT BRD_NM BRDNM , BRD_NM2 BRDNM2 , HR.DISPLAYNAME OWNERNM , HR.MAIL MAILADDRESS, HR.CN OWNERID FROM TBL_RS_BRD RES JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR
#ownerList[]#
AND RES.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE BRD_ID = #v_BRD_ID# AND RES.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT S.WRITERID, S.OWNERNM, S.DEPTNM, S.TITLE, DATE_FORMAT(S.STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE, DATE_FORMAT(S.ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE, T.BRD_NM, T.BRD_NM2, HR.MAIL FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE S INNER JOIN TBL_RS_BRD T ON S.OWNERID = T.BRD_ID AND S.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER HR ON S.WRITERID = HR.CN AND S.TENANT_ID = HR.TENANT_ID WHERE S.OWNERID = #resID# AND S.NUM = #num# AND S.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE PNUM = #v_P_pNum# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_companyID# AND OWNERID = #v_P_ownerID# AND REFLAG = '4' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT FILEPATH FROM TBL_RS_ATTACH WHERE RESID = #resID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ATTACHID ASC
select brd_step from tbl_rs_brd where brd_id = #resourceId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and brd_gb = '2'

select.isEqual: select brd_id, brd_step from tbl_rs_brd where brd_step = (select max(brd_step) from tbl_rs_brd where tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and brd_step < #brd_step# and brd_gb = '2' ) and tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and brd_gb = '2'

select brd_id, brd_step from tbl_rs_brd where brd_step = (select min(brd_step) from tbl_rs_brd where tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and brd_step > #brd_step# and brd_gb = '2' ) and tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and brd_gb = '2'

sqlMap.update: update tbl_rs_brd set brd_step = #resourceOrder# where brd_upper = #upperResourceId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_id = #resourceId#
sqlMap.select: select max(brd_step) from tbl_rs_brd where tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_upper = #upperResourceGroupId# and brd_gb = '2' group by brd_upper
sqlMap.update: update tbl_rs_brd set brd_upper = #selectedResourceGroupId#, brd_step = #brd_step# where tenant_id = #tenantId# and brd_company = #brd_company# and brd_id = #originResourceGroupId#
sqlMap.select: select case when count(*) >= 1 then 1 else 0 end as result from tbl_rs_resacl a where exists ( select 1 from tbl_rs_resacl b where a.resid = b.resid and a.companyid = b.companyid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.member_id = b.member_id and a.COMPANYID= #brd_company# and a.TENANT_ID= #tenantId# and a.resid=#selectedResourceGroupId# and a.access_lvl = '1' and (a.member_id=#userId# or a.member_id = 'everyone') )

SELECT DEPT_YN , SDA_YN , MEMBER_NAM , MEMBER_ID , ACCESS_LVL FROM TBL_RS_RESACL WHERE RESID = #v_BRD_UPPER# AND COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND SDA_Yn = 'Y' AND MEMBER_ID IN
#v_PUSERID[]#

SELECT A.BRD_ID , A.BRD_NM , A.BRD_NM2 , A.BRD_EXPLAIN , A.OWNDEPTID , A.OWNDEPTNM , A.OWNDEPTNM2 , A.OWNERID , A.OWNERNM , A.OWNERNM2 , A.OWNERPOSITION , A.OWNERPOSITION2 , A.OWNERCALL , IFNULL(A.RESLOCATION, ' ') RESLOCATION , CONCAT(SUBSTR(A.MAKEDATE, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(A.MAKEDATE, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(A.MAKEDATE, 7, 2)) MAKEDATE , IFNULL(A.APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG , IFNULL(A.RETURNFLAG, '0') RETURNFLAG , IFNULL(A.REPEATFLAG, '1') REPEATFLAG , A.BRD_ACCESS , A.RES_MAX_DATE , A.RES_MAX_USER_CNT FROM TBL_RS_BRD A JOIN TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET B ON A.BRD_ID = B.BRD_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BRD_COMPANY = B.BRD_COMPANY WHERE B.CN = #cn# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND A.BRD_COMPANY = #brd_company# AND A.APPROVEFLAG != 2
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_PERSPORTLET WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: select case when count(*) >= 1 then 1 else 0 end as result from tbl_rs_resacl a where exists ( select 1 from tbl_rs_resacl b where a.resid = b.resid and a.companyid = b.companyid and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and a.member_id = b.member_id and a.COMPANYID= #companyID# and a.TENANT_ID= #tenantID# and a.resid = #brdID# and ( a.member_id = #userID# or a.member_id = 'everyone' or a.member_id = #deptID# ) )

SELECT a.OWNERID, b.BRD_NM, COUNT(a.OWNERID) COUNT, SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(minute, STARTDATE, ENDDATE)) USAGE_TIME, a.COMPANYID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE a JOIN TBL_RS_BRD b ON a.OWNERID = b.BRD_ID AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE a.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND a.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND a.APPROVEFLAG = '1' AND b.BRD_GB = '2' AND (a.NUM, a.OWNERID) NOT IN ( SELECT c.NUM, c.OWNERID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULEREPETITION c WHERE c.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND c.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# ) AND STARTDATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND ENDDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') GROUP BY a.OWNERID ORDER BY CAST(a.OWNERID AS UNSIGNED) ASC

SELECT A.NUM , PNUM , A.OWNERID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') STARTDATE , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') ENDDATE , A.COMPANYID , C.BRD_NM FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE A JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULERepetition B ON A.NUM = B.NUM AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.OWNERID = B.OWNERID LEFT JOIN TBL_RS_BRD C ON A.OWNERID = C.BRD_ID WHERE STARTDATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#v_PENDDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AND A.COMPANYID = #v_PCOMPANYID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND REFLAG = '1' AND A.APPROVEFLAG = '1' AND ( STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') <= ENDDATETIME OR STR_TO_DATE(#v_PSTARTDATE#,'%Y-%m-%d %T') >= ENDDATETIME ) GROUP BY A.NUM ORDER BY CAST(A.OWNERID AS UNSIGNED) ASC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(CAT_ID AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 AS CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT into TBL_RS_FAV_CAT (CAT_ID, TOP_ID, USER_ID, CAT_NAME, UPDATEDATE, COMPANYID,TENANT_ID) VALUES (#CAT_ID#,
NULL
#TOP_ID#
, #USER_ID#, #CAT_NAME#, now(), #COMPANYID#,#TENANT_ID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAT_ID, TOP_ID, USER_ID, CAT_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(UPDATEDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATEDATE, COMPANYID, BRDYN, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID#

SELECT CAT_ID, TOP_ID, USER_ID, CAT_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(UPDATEDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPDATEDATE, COMPANYID, BRDYN, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE TOP_ID
IS NULL
= #TOP_ID#
AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_FAV_CAT SET CAT_NAME = #CAT_NAME# WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_RS_CAT_BRD (CAT_ID, BRD_ID, USER_ID, COMPANYID, UPDATEDATE,TENANT_ID) VALUES (#CAT_ID#, #BRD_ID#, #USER_ID#, #COMPANY_ID#, NOW(), #TENANT_ID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_ID, TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_NM, TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_NM2, TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_EXPLAIN, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNDEPTID, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNDEPTNM, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNDEPTNM2, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERID, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERNM, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERNM2, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERPOSITION, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERPOSITION2, TBL_RS_BRD.OWNERCALL, IFNULL(RESLOCATION, ' ') RESLOCATION, CONCAT(SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 1, 4), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 5, 2), '-', SUBSTR(MAKEDATE, 7, 2)) MAKEDATE, IFNULL(APPROVEFLAG, '0') APPROVEFLAG, IFNULL(RETURNFLAG, '0') RETURNFLAG, IFNULL(REPEATFLAG, '1') REPEATFLAG, BRD_ACCESS FROM TBL_RS_BRD JOIN TBL_RS_CAT_BRD ON TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_ID = TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.BRD_ID AND TBL_RS_BRD.BRD_COMPANY = TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.COMPANYID AND TBL_RS_BRD.TENANT_ID = TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.TENANT_ID WHERE TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.CAT_ID = #catId# AND TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.USER_ID = #userID# ORDER BY TBL_RS_CAT_BRD.UPDATEDATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) as UPDATEDATE FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND BRD_ID = #BRD_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_FAV_CAT SET BRDYN = #brdYn# WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_FAV_CAT SET BRDYN = #brdYn# WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
UPDATE TBL_RS_FAV_CAT SET TOP_ID = #TOP_ID#, UPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND CAT_ID = #CAT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE CAT_ID IN ( SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE TOP_ID = #TOP_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID# )
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND BRD_ID = #BRD_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_RS_CAT_BRD SET CAT_ID = #CAT_ID#, UPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE CAT_ID = #CUR_ID# AND BRD_ID = #BRD_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE TOP_ID = #CAT_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID# AND COMPANYID = #COMPANY_ID# AND TENANT_ID = #TENANT_ID#
SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE CAT_ID IN ( SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) AND BRDYN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE CAT_ID = #CAT_ID# AND BRD_ID = #BRD_ID# AND USER_ID = #USER_ID#
DELETE FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE BRD_ID = #v_P_Brd_ID# AND COMPANYID = #v_P_CompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.RES_MAX_DATE FROM TBL_RS_BRD A JOIN TBL_RS_SCHEDULE B ON A.BRD_ID = B.OWNERID WHERE B.OWNERID = #resourceID# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #companyID# LIMIT 1
